coverage.completeness_note: Our full-history node is the deepest on the network. No other node retains history before ledger ~1,800,000. Backfill is ongoing — coverage improves with each hourly update.

methodology.indexing: Outward crawl from 5 seed accounts (Task Node, Airdrop, Distribution, Treasury, Operator) via account_tx RPC with full pagination. New accounts discovered from transaction counterparties.
methodology.classification: Every account classified as human (has memos), bot (zero memos + high tx + bot peer cluster), or infrastructure (manually tagged). Classification runs on every update cycle.
methodology.sybil_detection: Four behavioral heuristics from public chain data: (1) zero-memo high-tx, (2) uniform balance fingerprinting, (3) peer cluster density, (4) counterparty overlap excluding infrastructure. Infrastructure wallets permanently whitelisted.
methodology.bot_detection: Accounts with 50+ transactions, zero memos, and >30% bot peers flagged as bot. Additional signals: uniform 15 PFT balance, 24-hour activity pattern, round-robin 1 PFT payments.
methodology.data_source: Private full-history node (testnet-full config, ledger_history=full). Not exposed publicly. Data served via static JSON updated hourly.
